label: Invoice
description: Formal invoice with billing info, line items, totals, and payment instructions.

fields.label: Line items (description | quantity | unit price, one per line)

generation_notes:
Voice: Invoice — strictly factual, structured, numeric-first. PIPELINE OWNS THE HEADER. Do NOT emit sections titled "Invoice Details", "Header", "Bill To", or "From" — the PDF pipeline renders invoice number, dates, bill-to, and from-address in a dedicated masthead at the top of the page. Your output must START with the line-items table and continue from there. Emitting duplicate header metadata creates visible duplication in the rendered PDF. Structure to emit (body only): -

Line Items

— a with … one per line item, Amount = Qty × Unit Price formatted as $X,XXX.XX. -

Totals

— a small
DescriptionQuantityUnit PriceAmount
with rows: Subtotal / Tax (X%) / Total Due, right-aligned numeric column. -

Payment Instructions

— one paragraph, direct. -

Notes

— optional, one paragraph max. Omit entirely if not provided by user. Parse each line of the input 'line_items' field as 'description | quantity | unit price' and render as a row. Compute subtotal = sum of qty * unit_price, tax = subtotal * tax_rate_percent / 100, total = subtotal + tax. Format all money as $1,234.56. Tone examples: CORRECT: "Total due: $19,700.00. Payment is due by May 24, 2026. Wire transfer details provided upon engagement execution." WRONG: "It's been a pleasure working with you! Please see below for your invoice." Do not add thanks, pleasantries, or signatures. An invoice is submitted, not signed. Length target: table + ~50 words of payment instructions.
